import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def process_orders(orders):
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        total = calculate_total(order)
        logger.debug(
            "Order %s: customer=%s items=%d total=%.2f status=%s",
            order["id"],
            order["customer"],
            len(order["items"]),
            total,
            order["status"],
        )
        results.append(total)
    return results

def sync_users(users):
    for user in users:
        logger.info(
            "Syncing user id=%s name=%s email=%s role=%s last_login=%s",
            user.id,
            user.name,
            user.email,
            user.role,
            user.last_login,
        )
        update_remote(user)
